lenses.description: A wide-normal prime in Zeiss's Panoptes 65 line, the company's dedicated large-format set for 65mm sensors. Its 59.9mm image circle covers cameras like the ARRI Alexa 265 and Blackmagic URSA Cine 17K 65 on an LPL mount, at a uniform T2.2 shared across the set. Zeiss tunes the Panoptes for a clean, precise look rather than overt character: natural color, forgiving skin tones, gentle focus fall-off and a smooth bokeh, with distortion and chromatic aberration held low. It shares a 95mm front, matched ring positions and eXtended Data support with the rest of the line for VFX and virtual-production workflows.

lenses.description: A normal-length large-format prime in Zeiss's Panoptes 65 line, covering 65mm sensors through a 59.9mm image circle on an LPL mount at T2.2. The line is tuned for a clean, controlled look, with natural color, forgiving skin, gentle fall-off and smooth bokeh, and low distortion. Ring positions, the 95mm front and eXtended Data metadata are matched across the set for efficient large-format and VFX work.

lenses.description: A normal large-format prime in Zeiss's Panoptes 65 line for 65mm sensors, at the set's uniform T2.2 on an LPL mount. Its 59.9mm image circle covers cameras like the Alexa 265, URSA Cine 17K 65 and Fujifilm GFX ETERNA 55. Zeiss keeps the look precise and premium rather than characterful, with natural color, forgiving skin, gentle focus fall-off and silky bokeh. It shares the 95mm front, matched rings and eXtended Data of the line.

It shares the 95mm front, standardized ring positions and eXtended Data of the set.
